001package applicationMain;
002
003public class ValidationUtil {
004
005        private ValidationUtil() {
006        }
007
008        public static String validateAsuUserId(String value) {
009                if (value == null || value.isEmpty()) {
010                        return "ASU User ID is required.";
011                }
012                if (value.contains(" ")) {
013                        return "ASU User ID cannot contain spaces.";
014                }
015                if (!value.matches("[A-Za-z0-9]+")) {
016                        return "ASU User ID can only contain letters and numbers.";
017                }
018                if (value.length() < 4 || value.length() > 20) {
019                        return "ASU User ID must be 4–20 characters.";
020                }
021                return null;
022        }
023
024        public static String validatePassword(String value) {
025                if (value == null || value.isEmpty()) {
026                        return "Password is required.";
027                }
028                if (value.contains(" ")) {
029                        return "Password cannot contain spaces.";
030                }
031                if (value.length() < 8) {
032                        return "Password must be at least 8 characters.";
033                }
034                return null;
035        }
036
037        public static String validateEmail(String value) {
038                if (value == null || value.trim().isEmpty()) {
039                        return "Email is required.";
040                }
041                String trimmed = value.trim();
042                if (trimmed.contains(" ")) {
043                        return "Please enter a valid email address with one @.";
044                }
045                int atIndex = trimmed.indexOf('@');
046                if (atIndex < 1 || atIndex != trimmed.lastIndexOf('@') || atIndex == trimmed.length() - 1) {
047                        return "Please enter a valid email address with one @.";
048                }
049                return null;
050        }
051
052        public static String validatePhoneNumber(String value) {
053                if (value == null || value.trim().isEmpty()) {
054                        return "Phone number must be a valid 10-digit number.";
055                }
056                String trimmed = value.trim();
057                if (!trimmed.matches("\\d+")) {
058                        return "Phone number can only contain numbers.";
059                }
060                if (trimmed.length() != 10) {
061                        return "Phone number must be a valid 10-digit number.";
062                }
063                return null;
064        }
065
066        public static String validatePersonName(String value) {
067                if (value == null || value.trim().isEmpty()) {
068                        return "Name is required.";
069                }
070                String trimmed = value.trim();
071                if (trimmed.length() < 1 || trimmed.length() > 50) {
072                        return "Name is required.";
073                }
074                if (!trimmed.matches("[A-Za-z\\s’'-]+")) {
075                        return "Name can only contain letters and basic punctuation.";
076                }
077                return null;
078        }
079
080        public static String validatePostId(int value) {
081                if (value <= 0) {
082                        return "Post ID must be a positive number.";
083                }
084                return null;
085        }
086
087        public static String validateReplyId(int value) {
088                if (value <= 0) {
089                        return "Reply ID must be a positive number.";
090                }
091                return null;
092        }
093
094        public static String validatePostTitle(String value) {
095                if (value == null || value.trim().isEmpty()) {
096                        return "Post title is required.";
097                }
098
099                String trimmed = value.trim();
100                if (trimmed.length() > 120) {
101                        return "Post title must be 1-120 characters.";
102                }
103                return null;
104        }
105
106        public static String validatePostBody(String value) {
107                if (value == null || value.trim().isEmpty()) {
108                        return "Post body is required.";
109                }
110
111                String trimmed = value.trim();
112                if (trimmed.length() > 2000) {
113                        return "Post body must be 1-2000 characters.";
114                }
115                return null;
116        }
117
118        public static String validateReplyBody(String value) {
119                if (value == null || value.trim().isEmpty()) {
120                        return "Reply body is required.";
121                }
122
123                String trimmed = value.trim();
124                if (trimmed.length() > 1000) {
125                        return "Reply body must be 1-1000 characters.";
126                }
127                return null;
128        }
129
130        public static String validateCourseTag(String value) {
131                if (value == null || value.trim().isEmpty()) {
132                        return "Course tag is required (example: CSE360).";
133                }
134
135                String trimmed = value.trim();
136                if (!trimmed.matches("[A-Za-z]{3}[0-9]{3}")) {
137                        return "Course tag must look like CSE360.";
138                }
139                return null;
140        }
141}
